profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Semacom Integrated Tbk manufactures and sells electrical panels in Indonesia. The company also engages in assembling of electric batteries and renewable energy related activities. In addition, it is involved in power distribution systems; and installation and panel testing services. PT Semacom Integrated Tbk was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia. PT Semacom Integrated Tbk is a subsidiary of Pt Semacom Global Mandiri.
